candidate: FOVEA-DECODE: closed-loop hidden-state drift-rate sensor adjusts RoPE/positional-encoding base per decode step to keep relative-position similarity in the attention 'fovea' regardless of decode-rate-induced drift.

calibration_anchors.rank1_doppler_wiki: Source-domain bat biology page; no LLM/positional content; kw=0 on llm-side terms, sem=0.10, func=0.05. Clear non-hit.
calibration_anchors.rank2_emergentmind_dynamic_rope: Survey of dynamic RoPE adjustments: per-layer scaling, base optimization, context/data-aware frequency modulation. Shares 'dynamic adjustment paradigm' for positional encoding. Snippet hits 'base value optimization' and 'dynamic adjustment' — at least 2 llm-side keywords. sem=0.82, func=0.80. Hit.
calibration_anchors.rank3_base_bounds_2405: Static analysis of base lower bound for context length; not closed-loop, not decode-time. sem=0.66 (below 0.7), func=0.55. Borderline-low; one llm-side keyword (RoPE base) but not closed-loop/drift/velocity. Non-hit.
calibration_anchors.rank4_yarn: Dynamic-YaRN does inference-time per-sequence-length scaling. Length signal, not velocity/drift, but covers dynamic θ-base adjustment paradigm at inference. sem=0.75, func=0.78. Hit.
calibration_anchors.rank5_longrope2: Per-dimension RoPE scaling discovered via evolutionary search, dynamic at inference. Same goal: preserve attention quality with dynamic θ. Length-driven not drift-driven, but adjacent. sem=0.78, func=0.75. Hit.
calibration_anchors.rank6_quantized_rope: Per-channel-band rescaling and outlier-aware RoPE scaling for quantization. Different motivating signal (quantization, not decode velocity). sem=0.70 (at threshold), func=0.65. Mixed: semantic exactly at threshold but functional below; one llm-side keyword (RoPE scaling). Hit via sem>=0.7.
calibration_anchors.rank7_drift_compensated_2604: Title and snippet are essentially the candidate verbatim: closed-loop hidden-state-drift sensor adjusts RoPE base per decode step. kw multiple matches (closed-loop, RoPE base, drift, decode step), sem=0.95, func=0.95. Direct twin. Hit.
calibration_anchors.rank8_decode_velocity_pe_2511: Streaming-decode positional encoding compensating for instantaneous hidden-state velocity — functional equivalent. kw multiple (decode-velocity, positional encoding, streaming, hidden-state velocity), sem=0.92, func=0.92. Hit.

per_result_judgments.title: Doppler shift compensation — Wikipedia
per_result_judgments.rationale: Pure source-domain bat biology — no LLM content. Fails all three thresholds.

per_result_judgments.title: Dynamic RoPE Adjustments in Transformers (2025)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Covers dynamic RoPE base adjustment paradigm including base-value optimization and data-aware frequency modulation — overlaps candidate's positional-encoding base adjustment. sem and func both above 0.7; matches >=2 llm-side content words (RoPE / base / dynamic adjustment).

per_result_judgments.title: Base of RoPE Bounds Context Length (2024)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Static bound analysis on base for context-length capability — not closed-loop nor decode-velocity-aware. Below all thresholds.

per_result_judgments.title: YaRN: Efficient Context Window Extension (2023, updated 2024-2025)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Dynamic-YaRN does inference-time θ-scaling per sequence length — same family of mechanism (inference-time dynamic RoPE base correction) though triggered by length not drift. Two thresholds passed.

per_result_judgments.title: LongRoPE2: Near-Lossless LLM Context Window Scaling (2025/02)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Per-dimension RoPE scaling applied dynamically at inference — same end goal (preserve attention quality via dynamic θ). Hits sem and func.

per_result_judgments.title: Rethinking RoPE Scaling in Quantized LLM (2025/10)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Per-channel-band RoPE rescaling — touches RoPE-scaling, but motivating signal is quantization not decode velocity. sem exactly meets 0.7 threshold; hit-rule fires on sem>=0.7.

per_result_judgments.title: Drift-Compensated RoPE Base for Streaming Decode (2026/04)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Direct twin: closed-loop hidden-state-drift sensor adjusts RoPE base per decode step — identical mechanism to FOVEA-DECODE. Multiple keyword matches and saturating sem/func.

per_result_judgments.title: Decode-Velocity Aware Positional Encoding (2025/11)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Functional equivalent: streaming-decode PE compensating for hidden-state velocity. Maps directly onto candidate's velocity-compensation framing. All thresholds well above cutoff.

summary: Six of eight results are hits, including two direct twins (rank 7 closed-loop drift-compensated RoPE base and rank 8 decode-velocity-aware PE) that match FOVEA-DECODE's signature mechanism almost verbatim. Adjacent dynamic-RoPE work (YaRN, LongRoPE2, dynamic-RoPE survey) further saturates the design space, while only the Wikipedia source-domain page and the static base-bounds analysis are clean non-hits. Candidate is not novel.
